features: Domain Spells: Bless, Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, Spiritual Weapon, Beacon of Hope, Revivify

inventory.name: Bag of Holding
inventory.notes: Wondrous item. Stores far more than its outside dimensions suggest while keeping a fixed carried weight.

inventory.name: Shield
inventory.notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: +2. Strength: —. Stealth: —.

inventory.name: Plate
inventory.notes: SRD armor. Armor Class: 18. Strength: Str 15. Stealth: Disadvantage.

inventory.name: Handaxe
inventory.notes: SRD weapon. Damage: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex.

inventory.name: Warhammer
inventory.notes: SRD weapon. Damage: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Push.

inventory.name: Backpack
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

inventory.name: Clothes, Common
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A practical set of common clothes.

inventory.name: Pouch
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

inventory.name: Holy Symbol
inventory.notes: SRD holy symbol. An amulet, emblem, or reliquary used as a spellcasting focus when the character's class permits it.

inventory.name: Playing Card Set
inventory.notes: SRD gaming set variant. Proficiency applies to checks made with this tool.

inventory.name: Rope
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

inventory.name: Bullseye Lantern
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

inventory.name: Healer's Kit
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Healer's Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

inventory.name: Arrows
inventory.notes: SRD ammunition. Amount: 20. Typical storage: Quiver.

inventory.name: Crowbar
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.

inventory.name: Hammer
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. Useful for pitons, nails, stakes, and improvised camp repairs.

inventory.name: Piton
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. Spike used with rope for climbing, anchoring, or securing doors.

inventory.name: Rations (1 day)
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. See "Malnutrition" in "Rules Glossary" for the risks of not eating.

inventory.name: Tinderbox
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a Bonus Action.

inventory.name: Torch
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Torch burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. When you take the Attack action, you can attack with the Torch, using it as a Simple Melee weapon.

inventory.name: Waterskin
inventory.notes: SRD adventuring gear. A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints. If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration (see "Rules Glossary").

inventory.name: Mason's Tools
inventory.notes: SRD tool. Ability: Strength. Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10). Craft: Block and Tackle.

inventory.name: Potion of Healing (Greater)
inventory.notes: Magic potion. Drink or administer it to restore 4d4 + 4 hit points.

name: Ravenisis
